ddls:
CREATE TABLE "heritage_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heritage site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the heritage site */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the site (e.g., Rural Urban Fringe, Thriving Rural) */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the site is located (e.g., England, Scotland, Wales) */,
  "site_size" INTEGER /* Size of the site (e.g., Small Village, Large Town) */,
  "total_sites" INTEGER /* Total number of sites in this category */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* The date the heritage site was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inspection */,
  "condition_rating" TEXT /* A rating of the site's current condition (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* A brief description of the site's historical significance */,
  "public_accessibility" TEXT /* Whether the site is accessible to the public (e.g., Yes, No, Partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heritage_sites_site_size FOREIGN KEY ("site_size") REFERENCES site_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heritage_sites_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES site_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heritage_sites_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the organization (e.g., National Trust, Private) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* The date the organization was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* The organization's website URL */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* The location of the organization's headquarters */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* The total budget allocated for heritage management */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization owning the site */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the site owned by the organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date ownership began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date ownership ended (if applicable) */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* The type of ownership (e.g., Full, Partial, Joint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_ownership_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_ownership_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Rural Urban Fringe, Thriving Rural) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's address */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., visit, inspection) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)
